name: verilock
description: VeriLock — document signer mini app; anchor document hashes on the Nimiq blockchain

scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,client -c blue,green "npm run dev --prefix server" "npm run dev --prefix client"
scripts.build: npm install --prefix server && npm install --prefix client && npm run build --prefix client
scripts.start:prod-local: NODE_ENV=production PORT=3003 CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3003 DATA_DIR=./server/data npm run start --prefix server
scripts.start:service-b-local: NODE_ENV=production PORT=3004 CORS_ORIGIN=http://localhost:3004 DATA_DIR=./server/data npm run start --prefix server
